evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or operational. While the use case describes a scenario where itinerary updates occur, there is no concrete API evidence or persisted state checks that demonstrate the existence of a system feature providing real-time updates. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an API or system feature that confirms the existence of real-time itinerary updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
